structured.title: Crew Plans Siren Starliner Heist
structured.overview: The conversation is about a covert plan to board the Siren of the Stars starliner, steal Galbank credentials, and use them to access a bank archive tied to the mystery of the 'Legacy' ship. One person explains that the Legacy is not Crook's fortune but an actual ship, likely a Galbank transport, and argues that the discovery changes the search. The crew then shifts to operational planning: one member must board the starliner, make contact with Rokov, secure credentials, and possibly retrieve additional valuables during a high-profile charity event where the Savior Award will be given away. The plan also involves keeping Rokov unaware of the Legacy, with instructions to pay him if useful or eliminate him if he becomes a problem. Tensions rise over loyalty, profit, and being cut out of the fleet, but the group ultimately finalizes the next step: head to the Siren and bring back the needed items.

apps_results.content:
## Legacy revealed
- “Legacy” is an actual ship, not fortune.
- It likely carried Galbank cargo.
- The recording confirms it exists.

## Search plan
- Narrow the search using known clues.
- Galbank cover-up may hide its location.
- Find the ship by tracing records.

## Starliner infiltration
- Use Trident Starliner’s VIP suite access.
- Board the ship with Rokov’s help.
- Get credentials for the bank archive.

## Rokov and leverage
- Rokov has long-haul and captain skills.
- He can provide inside access.
- Help him if useful; eliminate if needed.

## Mathis fallout
- Delgado cut Mathis from the fleet.
- Mathis resents losing his position.
- He warns about future retaliation.

## Siren of the Stars job
- A one-time event is on the Siren.
- Someone wants fleet access hidden.
- Steal credentials and a valuable rapport.

## Next steps
- Go to the Siren immediately.
- Meet later at the Last Nova.
- Bring back the boots.
